title: Fix several open bugs: assertion failures, error reporting, and elaboration issues
body:
## Summary

This PR fixes 12 bugs from the GitHub issue tracker, focusing on:
- Assertion failures converted to proper error messages
- Elaboration issues with arrays, structs, and uwire types
- Minor fixes in error reporting and path handling

## Bugs Fixed

| Issue | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| #1112 | Report error for invalid $bits argument instead of assertion |
| #670 | Allow class methods named same as class |
| #1140 | Report error for x/z in vector dimensions |
| #1170 | Skip $unit scope in tgt-sizer |
| #1187 | Quote paths in driver to allow spaces in -B flag |
| #1267 | Allow wire logic connected to uwire port to have multiple drivers |
| #1268 | Allow variables to be driven by primitive gate outputs |
| #521 | Allow variable indices in outer packed dimensions |
| #1134 | Allow struct member access in unpacked array of packed structs |
| #1265 | Allow continuous assignment of single-element unpacked arrays |
| #1220 | Allow uwire arrays as input ports |
| #716 | Report error for incompatible task argument types instead of assertion |

## Additional Regression Tests

- #1224: Packed vs unpacked dimension confusion (fixed by #1265)
- #1217: Unpacked array literal parsing (fixed by #1265)

## Testing

Each fix includes a regression test in `ivtest/ivltests/` added to `regress-sv.list`.
